bird.name: 黑冠斑翅鹛
bird.summary: 黑冠斑翅鹛（學名：Actinodura sodangorum），是雀形目噪鶥科斑翅鹛属下的一种鳥類。僅分布于老挝和越南。全球活动范围约为6,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。 黑冠斑翅鹛的栖息地包括种植园、亚热带或热带的高海拔的草原、疏灌丛和湿润山地林。其體重平均約3…

relations.subject: 黑冠斑翅鹛
relations.evidence: They are also found in Important Bird and Biodiversity Areas (IBA) including the DakChung Plateau, Lo Xo Pass, and Ngoc Linh. Their natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland, and plantations. Although they use degraded/cleared forests, they are mostly found in secondary growth or evergreen forests. Their elevation maximum was at , with observers noting fewer sightings above . The minimum elevation range could not be determined properly since the site contained loss of forest habitat below , though there were sightings at

relations.subject: 黑冠斑翅鹛
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and is considered Near Threatened on the IUCN Red List
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
